---
name: New Feature
about: Propose a new feature or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem or Need

Describe what problem this feature solves or what need it covers.

## Proposed Solution

Detailed description of the feature and how it should work.

## Alternatives Considered

Other solutions evaluated and why the main proposal is preferred.

## Technical Specifications

- **Frontend**: Required UI/UX changes
- **Backend**: Changes to business logic
- **Database**: Schema or model changes
- **Dependencies**: New libraries or services required

## Impact

- **Users**: How it affects the user experience
- **Performance**: Expected impact on performance
- **Maintainability**: Complexity added to the system

## Risks and Considerations

Possible difficulties, limitations, or side effects of the implementation.
